recommendations.title: The Death of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Drama, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When a hulking monster arrives on Earth and begins a mindless rampage, the Justice League is quickly called in to stop it. But it soon becomes apparent that only Superman can stand against the monstrosity.

recommendations.title: The Death and Return of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Animation, Action, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Death of Superman and Reign of the Supermen now presented as an over two-hour unabridged and seamless animated feature. Witness the no-holds-barred battle between the Justice League and an unstoppable alien force known only as Doomsday, a battle

recommendations.title: All Star Superman
recommendations.overview: Lex Luthor enacts his plan to rid the world of Superman, once and for all. Succeeding with solar radiation poisoning, the Man of Steel is slowly dying. With what little times remains, the Last Son of Krypton must confront the revealing of his secret

recommendations.title: Superman: Red Son
recommendations.overview: Set in the thick of the Cold War, Red Son introduces us to a Superman who landed in the USSR during the 1950s and grows up to become a Soviet symbol that fights for the preservation of Stalin’s brand of communism.

recommendations.title: Superman/Batman: Public Enemies
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Adventure, Drama, Action
recommendations.overview: United States President Lex Luthor uses the oncoming trajectory of a Kryptonite meteor to frame Superman and declare a $1 billion bounty on the heads of the Man of Steel and his ‘partner in crime’, Batman. Heroes and villains alike launch a relentles

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! & Batman: The Brave and the Bold
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Action, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang meet up with Batman and other friends to defeat evil villains and save the day.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Gods and Monsters
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In an alternate universe, very different versions of DC's Trinity fight against the government after they are framed for an embassy bombing.

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Death
recommendations.overview: Vincent, an artist with unresolved inner demons, meets a mysterious girl who helps him come to terms with his creative legacy… and eventual death.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans: The Judas Contract
recommendations.overview: Tara Markov is a girl who has power over earth and stone; she is also more than she seems. Is the newest Teen Titan an ally or a threat? And what are the mercenary Deathstroke's plans for the Titans?

recommendations.title: Batman vs Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Crime, Comedy, Action
recommendations.overview: Batman, Batgirl, and Robin forge an alliance with the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to fight against the Turtles' sworn enemy, The Shredder, who has apparently teamed up with Ra's Al Ghul and The League of Assassins.
